text.title: Refactoring Patterns Worked Example
text.summary: Extract Method applied to a 30-line `build_invoice` god function: tax + line totals + discount each extracted.

section.title: Before — god function
After — three Extract Method steps
section.note: Three Extract Method transforms, each its own commit. Two magic-number Replaces folded into named constants. Test outputs identical at every step. No behaviour change.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Commit 1 (`refactor: extract calculate_line_total`): tests stayed green; 1 file touched. Commit 2 (`refactor: extract calculate_tax`): tests stayed green; 1 file touched. Commit 3 (`refactor: replace tier-discount magic numbers`): tests stayed green; 1 file touched. Total: 3 commits, 1 file, scope-guard passes (3 < 5 each).
